text.name: rl_bridge_drakeAdultDesc
text.text: An adult drake. Drakes that are healthy and older than 6 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ganderAdultDesc
text.text: An adult gander. Ganders that are healthy and older than 10 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_tomcatAdultDesc
text.text: An adult tomcat. Tomcats that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.
